news.paragraph: Nvidia is experiencing positive momentum from analysts, with Susquehanna and Wells Fargo both raising their price targets to $275 and $315 respectively while maintaining positive ratings. The company's role in the AI sector remains a focal point, highlighted by reports of massive AI investment bets in 2026. Traders should also weigh potential geopolitical implications following reports that CEO Jensen Huang may miss a trip to China.
headlines: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to Reportedly Miss Trump's China Trip
Susquehanna Adjusts Price Target on Nvidia to $275 From $250, Maintains Positive Rating
This Will Be Nvidia’s Stock Price This Year
Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Nvidia to $315 From $265, Maintains Overweight Rating
Nvidia's AI Investment Bets Top $40 Billion In 2026, Led By OpenAI Stake
How Nvidia could once again become the 'flavor of the day'
